notes.price.raw: Original price string exactly as listed on the source.
notes.price.gp: Numeric gold-piece value when a concrete number was listed; null for Varies/Priceless/Special.
notes.price.base_item_plus: True when source showed 'B+N', meaning add N gp to the base (mundane) item's cost.
notes.price.special: Set to varies/priceless/special when no fixed number applies; null otherwise.
notes.multi_rarity: True when the same item name appears under more than one rarity table (e.g. scaling +1/+2/+3 items).
notes.url: Best-effort deep link to the item's page; verify slugs before relying on them programmatically.
